CustomField.description: Formula image field. Translates nepa_risk_tier__c into a colored flag: red = Very High, orange (using yellow as Salesforce default) = High, green = Low or Moderate, gray = blank/unknown. Renders in IndividualApplication list views so the ambient risk signal reads before the coordinator opens the record. Designed for Scenes 1-D, 3-C, and 4-B list context in the CEQ Permitting Innovators demo.
CustomField.formula: CASE(nepa_risk_tier__c, "Very High", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Very High — Likely Litigation", 16, 16), "High", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_yellow.gif","High Risk", 16, 16), "Moderate", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_green.gif", "Moderate Risk", 16, 16), "Low", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_green.gif", "Low Risk", 16, 16), IMAGE("/s.gif", "Unknown", 1, 1) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Red = Very High litigation risk. Yellow = High. Green = Moderate/Low. Blank = unscored. Visible in list views before opening the record.
CustomField.label: Risk Tier Flag
